name: faceswapper
description: Local AI Face Swap. Upload any source photo and any target face.

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.install:ai: cd ai-service && python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: echo 'Run in separate terminals: npm run dev:ai, npm run dev:backend, npm run dev:frontend'
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend && npm run test:ai
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
